_comment: Workshop stations for the Üzemi Tábla board. `stage` maps each physical station to one of the 6 macro production stages (Stage enum in prisma/schema.prisma, aligned with joinerytech-platform's WorkflowStepName). `defaultWorkflow` is the kanban column sequence used when a station has no StationWorkflow override in the DB. Edit this file to add/rename/remove stations — nothing station-related is hardcoded in application code.
